summary: TWO_COLUMN determinant intuition via a diagonal matrix. Left: the unit square and basis arrows are transformed by ApplyMatrix with A = [[3,0],[0,2]], so the square becomes a 3-by-2 rectangle. Braces label the new width and height, and an area label updates from 1 to 6. Right: the matrix, det(A)=6, and the rule new area = |det(A)| * old area.
